message:
bench: add rate limit tracker benchmarks

Benchmarks record_at (insert/update), is_pane_rate_limited_at (lookup),
provider_status_at (O(n) aggregation), and gc_at (garbage collection)
across varying tracker sizes (10-500 panes). These are called per
detection event, per scheduling decision, and per GC cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -465,6 +465,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "retry_backoff"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "rate_limit_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
